creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 158552
wpa_supplicant-2.4_4.diff

Good day.
Upstream announced today on the oss-security mailing list a vulnerability with the WPS_NFC option.  The option is off by default however patch attached to resolve it for anyone using the option.

References:
http://w1.fi/security/2015-5/incomplete-wps-and-p2p-nfc-ndef-record-payload-length-validation.txt
http://w1.fi/security/2015-2/0001-WPS-Fix-HTTP-chunked-transfer-encoding-parser.patch
